featuretablefilter 0.1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • featuretablefilter Tutorial: Complete Guide to Microbiome Feature Table Filtering

    Reference

    All functions

    analyze_depth_sparsity()

    Compute depth-sparsity relationship and identify outlier samples

    analyze_feature_network()

    Calculate network connectivity metrics for features

    calc_hill_numbers()

    Calculate Hill Numbers (Effective Number of Species) for a range of q values

    calc_shannon_ens()

    Calculate Shannon Effective Number of Species (Hill number q=1)

    calc_simpson_ens()

    Calculate Simpson Effective Number of Species (Hill number q=2)

    calculate_feature_cv()

    Calculate coefficient of variation (CV) for features

    calculate_sparsity()

    Calculate sparsity of a feature table

    compute_filtering_qc()

    Compute quality control metrics comparing original and filtered tables

    compute_mutual_information()

    Calculate pairwise mutual information between features

    compute_scree()

    Compute scree/saturation diagnostics for filtering thresholds

    convert_feature_table()

    Generic conversion function for feature tables

    convert_to_relative()

    Convert absolute abundance table to relative abundance table

    estimate_chao_coverage()

    Estimate Chao's sample coverage for samples

    estimate_good_coverage()

    Estimate Good's coverage for samples

    estimate_iqr_cutoff()

    Estimate minimum read cutoff using Interquartile Range (IQR) / Tukey's Method

    estimate_mad_cutoff()

    Estimate minimum read cutoff using Median Absolute Deviation (MAD)

    estimate_mi_knn()

    Estimate mutual information using k-nearest neighbors (KSG estimator)

    filter_by_coverage()

    Filter samples by minimum coverage

    filter_by_coverage_estimator()

    Filter samples based on ecological coverage estimators

    filter_by_network_connectivity()

    Filter features based on network connectivity

    filter_by_relative_cutoff()

    Filter features using relative abundance cutoff applied as absolute threshold

    filter_by_singleton_ratio()

    Filter samples by singleton/doubleton ratio

    filter_cross_talk() filter_index_hopping()

    Filter cross-talk/index-switching artifacts

    filter_depth_sparsity_outliers()

    Convenience function: filter samples based on depth-sparsity outliers

    filter_features_by_abundance()

    Filter features based on abundance threshold

    filter_features_joint()

    Filter features using joint abundance and prevalence criteria

    from_TSE()

    Convert from TreeSummarizedExperiment to feature table data.frame

    from_phyloseq()

    Convert from phyloseq object to feature table data.frame

    identify_sparsity_elbow()

    Identify the sparsity elbow in sample coverage distribution

    load_feature_table()

    Load a feature table from TSV or CSV file

    plot_coverage_histogram()

    Plot histogram of sample coverage

    plot_depth_sparsity()

    Plot depth-sparsity relationship with outlier detection

    plot_feature_network()

    Plot feature network connectivity

    plot_presence_analysis()

    Plot presence frequency analysis for features and samples

    plot_qc_comparison()

    Create visualization comparison of original vs filtered feature tables

    plot_reads_vs_asvs()

    Plot Total Reads vs Observed ASVs with outlier detection

    plot_scree()

    Plot scree/saturation diagnostic results

    plot_sparsity_elbow()

    Plot sparsity elbow analysis results

    plot_top_features_stacked()

    Plot top N features as stacked barplots comparing original and filtered tables

    run_filtering_pipeline()

    Run a complete feature table filtering pipeline with QC report

    to_TSE()

    Convert feature table data.frame to TreeSummarizedExperiment

    to_phyloseq()

    Convert feature table data.frame to phyloseq object

    Contents

    Developed by Vojtech Barton.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
